/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libbinlogstandalone.a CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/binlog_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/buffer/grow_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/buffer/grow_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/codecs/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/compressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/decompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/decompress_status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/payload_event_buffer_istream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/zstd_comp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/zstd_dec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/none_comp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/compression/none_dec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/control_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/event_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/gtids/gtid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/gtids/gtidset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/load_data_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/rows_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogstandalone_static.dir/__/__/libbinlogevents/src/uuid.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libbinlogstandalone.a
